overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, transitioning from a covered neon-lit pedestrian walkway to an open street with towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements. The footage is from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring heavy use of neon lighting and reflective wet surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with neon storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a covered walkway with yellow guide line, passing metal barriers and neon-lit storefronts

notable_agents.action: man in blue shorts walking in opposite direction, passing by the barriers
woman with red mohawk and sunglasses walking toward camera

entered.detail: overhead metal and concrete structure covering the pedestrian path
yellow and black striped construction barriers lining the left side
vertical digital advertisement screens with purple and pink neon lighting
futuristic convenience store with cyan neon signage reading 25h/7
palm trees in raised concrete planters with yellow trim

segments.scene_description: Walking through a covered urban walkway at night, flanked by metal barriers on the left and neon-lit storefronts on the right. The wet concrete reflects the purple and cyan neon signs, including a prominent 25h/7 convenience store. Sparse pedestrians walk in the opposite direction as the camera moves steadily forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition zone approaching open street exit

events.description: bright daylight becomes visible ahead at the end of the covered walkway

agents.ego_description: continuing through the walkway toward the bright exit, passing more pedestrians and storefronts

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking toward camera, exiting the covered area

entered.detail: storefront with 'TECH CORP' signage and yellow accent lighting
large holographic projection of an orange koi fish swimming in the air
elevated highway with colorful LED light strips showing pink and blue gradients

segments.scene_description: Approaching the exit of the covered walkway, the scene brightens significantly as daylight becomes visible ahead. The Tech Corp storefront appears on the left while a large holographic fish advertisement and colorful LED-lit overpass become visible in the distance. Pedestrian density increases as people move toward the open street.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban intersection with elevated highway and holographic displays

events.description: exits covered walkway into open street with visible traffic and skyscrapers
vehicles pass by on the multi-lane road to the left

agents.ego_description: walking across the open street area toward the intersection, navigating around other pedestrians while vehicles pass nearby

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving along the road, passing behind the pedestrian area

entered.detail: towering dark glass and steel megastructures with illuminated windows and details
multi-lane asphalt road with moving vehicle traffic
street light pole with circular yellow signage

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway into a vast open intersection surrounded by towering futuristic skyscrapers. The camera crosses the street area as vehicles drive past on the left. A massive holographic fish swims through the air near an elevated highway adorned with colorful LED light strips that shift between pink, blue, and green.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza beneath megatowers with upward view of skyline

events.description: camera tilts upward to focus on the towering skyscrapers and holographic display above

agents.ego_description: slowing to look up at the massive skyscrapers and holographic advertisements overhead, taking in the scale of the architecture

entered.detail: close-up view of reflective glass and metal building exterior with geometric patterns
dark blue sky visible between the towering buildings

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to reveal the immense scale of the surrounding megastructures, with sunlight reflecting off the glass facades of towering skyscrapers. The holographic fish continues to swim overhead against the dark blue night sky, while the architecture displays a mix of brutalist concrete and sleek modern glass designs.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined, neon-lit pedestrian corridor into a vast, open urban intersection dominated by towering megastructures. It begins by gliding through a covered walkway where purple and cyan neon signs from storefronts reflect off wet concrete, passing sparse pedestrians and a 25h/7 convenience store. As the camera approaches the exit, the scene brightens and expands, revealing a Tech Corp storefront and a distant holographic fish beneath a colorful LED-lit overpass. The perspective then emerges into a wide intersection where vehicles drive past and the massive holographic fish swims through the air beside an elevated highway of shifting pink, blue, and green lights. Finally, the camera tilts upward to reveal the immense scale of the surrounding skyscrapers, contrasting brutalist concrete with sleek glass facades reflecting the light against a dark blue night sky.
